name: Hydroflow Cloak
description: History Added in the Exalt Version 6.9.0.0 (Apr 2026) update.
effects: After exiting sneak: Fire 2 additional projectiles dealing damage equal to your Lethal Strike damage for 2.4 seconds. Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 70 (+3 per WIS > 34) and 50% (+0.5% per WIS > 34) of target’s defense as additional damage for 2.4 seconds MP Cost: 2 MP/proj Cooldown: 0.1 sec
